productDisplayName: Fossil Women Silver Dial Analog & Chronograph Watch CH2823
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case, stainless steel backDial style: White dial with minutes, second and hour handFeatures: A screw to reset the time, 3-faced chronograph display, a date aperture near the 4-hour mark, 2 push-buttons to adjust the settingsComes in a signature Fossil caseWarranty: 2-year international warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
